text: The board may adopt rules as necessary to implement and administer this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 731. Assembled Vehicles
##### § 731.002 — Rules

The board may adopt rules as necessary to implement and administer this chapter.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1079 (H.B.1755), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: The board may adopt rules as necessary to implement and administer this chapter.
